plan.acceptance_test: Submit a sandbox order and correlate every state change.
plan.post_change_check: Confirm the order and audit event reconcile.

operational_controls.trace_or_correlation_ids: Persist one correlation ID across agent, checkout, and OMS events.
operational_controls.authorization_evidence: Retain the approving actor and policy decision for every order.
operational_controls.audit_events: Emit immutable requested, approved, submitted, and completed events.
operational_controls.idempotency_or_deduplication: Reuse the order intent ID as the idempotency key and reject duplicates.
operational_controls.reconciliation_checks: Reconcile submitted intents against OMS orders every five minutes.
operational_controls.retained_failure_evidence: Retain redacted request, response, and state-transition evidence for 30 days.
operational_controls.health_signals: Measure submission success, error rate, latency, and reconciliation lag.
operational_controls.alert_thresholds: Page when errors exceed 2% for five minutes or reconciliation lag exceeds ten minutes.
operational_controls.human_escalation_path: Route unresolved alerts to the incident commander and support lead.
operational_controls.disable_or_kill_switch: Disable order submission without disabling read-only order status.
operational_controls.rollback_or_recovery_procedure: Roll back the connector and replay reconciled pending intents once.
operational_controls.safe_dependency_fallback: Stop writes, preserve the intent, and direct the customer to assisted checkout.
operational_controls.approval_workflow: Require an approved order intent before submission.
operational_controls.policy_grounding: Evaluate the approved checkout and fulfillment policies before submission.
